title: Accounting: debit
content:
concept: "debit"
nepali: "डेबिट / नामे"
meaning_en: "Left side entry in double-entry bookkeeping"
simple_explanation: "Paisa kahaa gayo / k aayo — asset ra kharcha badhcha"
memory_trick: "Debit = Door — asset/expense ma paisa aayo ki badhyo"
common_confusions: ["Debit does not always mean cash going out"]
examples: ["Cash Dr 5000 — cash aayo", "Rent expense Dr 15000"]

metadata.meaning_en: Left side entry in double-entry bookkeeping
metadata.simple_explanation: Paisa kahaa gayo / k aayo — asset ra kharcha badhcha
metadata.memory_trick: Debit = Door — asset/expense ma paisa aayo ki badhyo
common_confusions: Debit does not always mean cash going out

title: Accounting: credit
content:
concept: "credit"
nepali: "क्रेडिट / जम्मा"
meaning_en: "Right side entry in double-entry"
simple_explanation: "Paisa kaha bata aayo / kaha jancha — liability ra income badhcha"
memory_trick: "Credit = source — rin ra aamdani credit side"
common_confusions: ["Credit does not always mean money received"]
examples: ["Sales Cr 10000", "Loan Cr 200000"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Paisa kaha bata aayo / kaha jancha — liability ra income badhcha
metadata.memory_trick: Credit = source — rin ra aamdani credit side
common_confusions: Credit does not always mean money received

title: Accounting: journal
content:
concept: "journal"
nepali: "जर्नल"
meaning_en: "Book of original entry for transactions"
simple_explanation: "Har transaction ko pahilo record — date, narration, debit/credit"
memory_trick: "Journal = diary of business"
common_confusions: ["Journal vs ledger confusion"]
examples: ["Daily sales journal entry", "Payment journal"]

metadata.meaning_en: Book of original entry for transactions
metadata.simple_explanation: Har transaction ko pahilo record — date, narration, debit/credit

title: Accounting: ledger
content:
concept: "ledger"
nepali: "खाता बही / लेजर"
meaning_en: "Account-wise summary of all entries"
simple_explanation: "Ek party/account ko sabai movement"
memory_trick: "Ledger = individual khata ko history"
common_confusions: ["Ledger is not trial balance"]
examples: ["Ram ko ledger", "Cash ledger"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Ek party/account ko sabai movement

title: Accounting: trial balance
content:
concept: "trial balance"
nepali: "चाउकट बही"
meaning_en: "List of all account balances — debit total = credit total"
simple_explanation: "Month end check — mismatch bhayo bhane error cha"
memory_trick: "Trial = test before final reports"
common_confusions: ["Trial balance can balance with errors"]
examples: ["TB mismatch → missing entry"]

metadata.meaning_en: List of all account balances — debit total = credit total
metadata.simple_explanation: Month end check — mismatch bhayo bhane error cha
common_confusions: Trial balance can balance with errors

title: Accounting: double entry
content:
concept: "double entry"
nepali: "दोहोरो लेखा"
meaning_en: "Every transaction affects at least two accounts"
simple_explanation: "Ek account debit, arko credit — total equal"
memory_trick: "Nothing comes from nowhere"
common_confusions: ["Single entry vs double entry"]
examples: ["Cash sale: Cash Dr, Sales Cr"]

metadata.meaning_en: Every transaction affects at least two accounts
metadata.simple_explanation: Ek account debit, arko credit — total equal
examples: Cash sale: Cash Dr, Sales Cr

title: Accounting: balance sheet
content:
concept: "balance sheet"
nepali: "सम्पत्ति दायित्व विवरण"
meaning_en: "Snapshot of assets, liabilities, equity at a date"
simple_explanation: "Ke cha hamro sanga (asset) ra ke tirnu baki (liability)"
memory_trick: "Balance = what you own minus what you owe"
common_confusions: ["Not same as bank balance"]
examples: ["sampatti = assets", "rin = liabilities"]

metadata.meaning_en: Snapshot of assets, liabilities, equity at a date
metadata.simple_explanation: Ke cha hamro sanga (asset) ra ke tirnu baki (liability)
metadata.memory_trick: Balance = what you own minus what you owe

title: Accounting: profit and loss
content:
concept: "profit and loss"
nepali: "नाफा नोक्सान विवरण"
meaning_en: "Income minus expenses for a period"
simple_explanation: "Yo mahina kati kamayo kati kharcha bhayo"
memory_trick: "P&L = performance report"
common_confusions: ["Cash profit vs accounting profit"]
examples: ["Sales - COGS - expenses = net profit"]

metadata.meaning_en: Income minus expenses for a period
metadata.simple_explanation: Yo mahina kati kamayo kati kharcha bhayo

title: Accounting: cash flow
content:
concept: "cash flow"
nepali: "नगद प्रवाह"
meaning_en: "Actual cash in and out"
simple_explanation: "Profit cha tara cash chaina — timing difference"
memory_trick: "Cash is king for small business"
common_confusions: ["Profit ≠ cash flow"]
examples: ["Udharo bikri → profit but no cash"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Profit cha tara cash chaina — timing difference
metadata.memory_trick: Cash is king for small business
examples: Udharo bikri → profit but no cash

title: Accounting: asset
content:
concept: "asset"
nepali: "सम्पत्ति"
meaning_en: "Resource controlled with future economic benefit"
simple_explanation: "Ghar, stock, cash, receivable — hamro ke cha"
memory_trick: "Asset = aafno"
common_confusions: ["Asset vs expense at purchase"]
examples: ["Inventory asset", "Vehicle asset"]

metadata.meaning_en: Resource controlled with future economic benefit
metadata.simple_explanation: Ghar, stock, cash, receivable — hamro ke cha

title: Accounting: liability
content:
concept: "liability"
nepali: "दायित्व / ऋण"
meaning_en: "Present obligation to pay"
simple_explanation: "Udharo, loan, payable — tirnu baki"
memory_trick: "Liability = arko ko paisa"
common_confusions: ["Liability vs expense"]
examples: ["Supplier payable", "Bank loan"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Udharo, loan, payable — tirnu baki

title: Accounting: equity
content:
concept: "equity"
nepali: "पूँजी / इक्विटी"
meaning_en: "Owner's residual interest"
simple_explanation: "Malik le lagaako paisa + retained profit"
memory_trick: "Equity = net worth"
common_confusions: ["Equity vs liability"]
examples: ["Capital introduced", "Retained earnings"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Malik le lagaako paisa + retained profit

title: Accounting: income
content:
concept: "income"
nepali: "आम्दानी"
meaning_en: "Revenue from ordinary activities"
simple_explanation: "Bikri, service fee — regular business kamai"
memory_trick: "Income = aaundai paisa"
common_confusions: ["Income vs gain"]
examples: ["Sales income", "Service income"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Bikri, service fee — regular business kamai

title: Accounting: expense
content:
concept: "expense"
nepali: "खर्च"
meaning_en: "Cost incurred to earn revenue"
simple_explanation: "Talab, bhada, bijuli — business kharcha"
memory_trick: "Expense = jane paisa"
common_confusions: ["Expense vs asset purchase"]
examples: ["Salary expense", "Rent expense"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Talab, bhada, bijuli — business kharcha

title: Accounting: gain
content:
concept: "gain"
nepali: "लाभ"
meaning_en: "Non-operating positive difference"
simple_explanation: "Asset bechda book bhanda badhi ma"
memory_trick: "Gain = extra profit outside main business"
common_confusions: ["Gain vs income"]
examples: ["Gain on asset sale"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Asset bechda book bhanda badhi ma
metadata.memory_trick: Gain = extra profit outside main business

title: Accounting: loss
content:
concept: "loss"
nepali: "नोक्सान"
meaning_en: "Non-operating negative difference"
simple_explanation: "Stock nash, asset impairment"
memory_trick: "Loss = business bata gako ghat"
common_confusions: ["Loss vs expense"]
examples: ["noksan vo 400 — stock loss"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Stock nash, asset impairment

title: Accounting: accrual
content:
concept: "accrual"
nepali: "उचित लेखा"
meaning_en: "Record when earned/incurred not when cash moves"
simple_explanation: "Mahina sakyo talab tirna baki — accrue garnu"
memory_trick: "Accrual = time match"
common_confusions: ["Cash basis vs accrual"]
examples: ["Accrued salary", "Accrued rent"]

metadata.meaning_en: Record when earned/incurred not when cash moves
metadata.simple_explanation: Mahina sakyo talab tirna baki — accrue garnu

title: Accounting: matching
content:
concept: "matching"
nepali: "मिलान सिद्धान्त"
meaning_en: "Match expenses to related revenue period"
simple_explanation: "J sales sanga jodiyeko kharcha tyahi period"
memory_trick: "Matching = fair picture"
common_confusions: ["Prepaid vs expense"]
examples: ["COGS matched to sales"]

metadata.meaning_en: Match expenses to related revenue period
metadata.simple_explanation: J sales sanga jodiyeko kharcha tyahi period

title: Accounting: going concern
content:
concept: "going concern"
nepali: "सतत सञ्चालन"
meaning_en: "Assume business continues — not closing"
simple_explanation: "Asset lai fire sale value ma lidaina"
memory_trick: "Going concern = business chalirahancha"
common_confusions: ["Liquidation basis different"]
examples: ["Depreciation assumes going concern"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Asset lai fire sale value ma lidaina

title: Accounting: materiality
content:
concept: "materiality"
nepali: "महत्त्व"
meaning_en: "Insignificant items can be simplified"
simple_explanation: "Rs 50 typo — material chaina"
memory_trick: "Material = decision change garne"
common_confusions: ["Not excuse for fraud"]
examples: ["Small stationery — immaterial"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Rs 50 typo — material chaina

title: Accounting: depreciation
content:
concept: "depreciation"
nepali: "मूल्यह्रास"
meaning_en: "Systematic allocation of asset cost over life"
simple_explanation: "Gadi, machine ko mulya hras"
memory_trick: "Depreciation = wear and tear in books"
common_confusions: ["Depreciation ≠ cash"]
examples: ["depreciation 5000 monthly"]

metadata.meaning_en: Systematic allocation of asset cost over life
metadata.simple_explanation: Gadi, machine ko mulya hras
metadata.memory_trick: Depreciation = wear and tear in books

title: Accounting: inventory
content:
concept: "inventory"
nepali: "स्टक / भण्डार"
meaning_en: "Goods held for sale"
simple_explanation: "Pasal ko saman — asset ho jaba samma becheko chaina"
memory_trick: "Inventory = becna baki mal"
common_confusions: ["Inventory vs COGS at sale"]
examples: ["stock kineko", "stock valuation"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Pasal ko saman — asset ho jaba samma becheko chaina

title: Accounting: COGS
content:
concept: "COGS"
nepali: "बिक्री गरिएको वस्तुको लागत"
meaning_en: "Cost of goods sold"
simple_explanation: "Kinako saman ko cost jaba becheko"
memory_trick: "COGS = kinne cost of sold items"
common_confusions: ["COGS vs purchase"]
examples: ["cogs 3000 for sales"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Kinako saman ko cost jaba becheko
metadata.memory_trick: COGS = kinne cost of sold items

title: Accounting: receivable
content:
concept: "receivable"
nepali: "लिन बाँकी"
meaning_en: "Amount customers owe us"
simple_explanation: "Udharo bikri — Ram bata lina baki"
memory_trick: "Receivable = aune paisa"
common_confusions: ["Receivable vs income"]
examples: ["Ram lai 500 udhaar"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Udharo bikri — Ram bata lina baki

title: Accounting: payable
content:
concept: "payable"
nepali: "दिन बाँकी"
meaning_en: "Amount we owe suppliers"
simple_explanation: "Udharo kharid — supplier lai tirnu baki"
memory_trick: "Payable = tirnu baki"
common_confusions: ["Payable vs expense"]
examples: ["Supplier payable 20000"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Udharo kharid — supplier lai tirnu baki

title: Accounting: NAS
content:
concept: "NAS"
nepali: "नेपाल लेखा मानक"
meaning_en: "Nepal Accounting Standards"
simple_explanation: "Nepal ma company le follow garne standards"
memory_trick: "NAS = Nepal ko GAAP"
common_confusions: ["NAS vs IFRS"]
examples: ["NAS for large entities"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Nepal ma company le follow garne standards

title: Accounting: NFRS
content:
concept: "NFRS"
nepali: "नेपाल वित्तीय रिपोर्टिङ मानक"
meaning_en: "Nepal Financial Reporting Standards"
simple_explanation: "IFRS-aligned standards in Nepal"
memory_trick: "NFRS = updated framework"
common_confusions: ["NFRS for SMEs"]
examples: ["Listed companies NFRS"]

metadata.simple_explanation: IFRS-aligned standards in Nepal

title: Accounting: opening balance
content:
concept: "opening balance"
nepali: "सुरुवाती मौज्दात"
meaning_en: "Balances brought forward from prior period"
simple_explanation: "Naya fiscal year suru ma agadi baki"
memory_trick: "Opening = last year closing"
common_confusions: ["Opening vs transaction"]
examples: ["opening balance 50000 debtor"]

metadata.meaning_en: Balances brought forward from prior period
metadata.simple_explanation: Naya fiscal year suru ma agadi baki

title: Accounting: closing balance
content:
concept: "closing balance"
nepali: "अन्तिम मौज्दात"
meaning_en: "Balance at period end"
simple_explanation: "Month/year end pachi baki"
memory_trick: "Closing becomes next opening"
common_confusions: ["Closing vs trial balance"]
examples: ["closing cash balance"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Month/year end pachi baki

title: Accounting: reconciliation
content:
concept: "reconciliation"
nepali: "मिलान"
meaning_en: "Matching two records — bank vs books"
simple_explanation: "Bank statement ra khata milaunu"
memory_trick: "Reconciliation = difference find"
common_confusions: ["Bank recon vs audit"]
examples: ["bank reconciliation mismatch"]

metadata.meaning_en: Matching two records — bank vs books
metadata.simple_explanation: Bank statement ra khata milaunu

title: Accounting: provision
content:
concept: "provision"
nepali: "प्रावधान"
meaning_en: "Estimated liability of uncertain timing"
simple_explanation: "Bad debt huna sakcha — reserve rakhn"
memory_trick: "Provision = just in case"
common_confusions: ["Provision vs accrual"]
examples: ["bad debt provision"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Bad debt huna sakcha — reserve rakhn

title: Accounting: bad debt
content:
concept: "bad debt"
nepali: "खराब देनदारी"
meaning_en: "Uncollectible receivable"
simple_explanation: "Ram le tirna sakdaina — write off"
memory_trick: "Bad debt = loss on credit sale"
common_confusions: ["Write-off vs provision"]
examples: ["bad debt write off 2000"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Ram le tirna sakdaina — write off
metadata.memory_trick: Bad debt = loss on credit sale

title: Accounting: working capital
content:
concept: "working capital"
nepali: "कारोबार पूँजी"
meaning_en: "Current assets minus current liabilities"
simple_explanation: "Daily operation chalauna paisa"
memory_trick: "Working capital = liquidity for business"
common_confusions: ["Not same as total capital"]
examples: ["Low working capital risk"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Daily operation chalauna paisa

title: Accounting: capital introduced
content:
concept: "capital introduced"
nepali: "पूँजी थप"
meaning_en: "Owner puts money into business"
simple_explanation: "Malik le paisa haleko business ma"
memory_trick: "Capital intro = equity increase"
common_confusions: ["Not income"]
examples: ["capital lagaayo 100000"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Malik le paisa haleko business ma

title: Accounting: drawings
content:
concept: "drawings"
nepali: "निकासा"
meaning_en: "Owner takes money out for personal use"
simple_explanation: "Malik le personal lai paisa nikalyo"
memory_trick: "Drawings reduce equity"
common_confusions: ["Drawings vs salary"]
examples: ["drawings 10000"]

metadata.meaning_en: Owner takes money out for personal use
metadata.simple_explanation: Malik le personal lai paisa nikalyo

title: Accounting: contra entry
content:
concept: "contra entry"
nepali: "कन्ट्रा प्रविष्टि"
meaning_en: "Transfer between related accounts"
simple_explanation: "Cash bank ma haleko — cash ghatyo bank badhyo"
memory_trick: "Contra = internal move"
common_confusions: ["Not expense"]
examples: ["cash to bank 20000"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Cash bank ma haleko — cash ghatyo bank badhyo

title: Accounting: narration
content:
concept: "narration"
nepali: "विवरण"
meaning_en: "Explanation text on voucher"
simple_explanation: "Entry ko reason lekhne — 'bijuli bill'"
memory_trick: "Narration = future reference"
common_confusions: ["Missing narration causes confusion"]
examples: ["narration: Ram le tiryo"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Entry ko reason lekhne — 'bijuli bill'

title: Accounting: voucher
content:
concept: "voucher"
nepali: "भौचर"
meaning_en: "Document supporting a journal entry"
simple_explanation: "Proof — bill, receipt, memo"
memory_trick: "No voucher no entry — audit rule"
common_confusions: ["Voucher vs invoice"]
examples: ["payment voucher", "journal voucher"]

metadata.simple_explanation: Proof — bill, receipt, memo
metadata.memory_trick: No voucher no entry — audit rule

title: Accounting: audit
content:
concept: "audit"
nepali: "लेखा परीक्षण"
meaning_en: "Independent examination of financial statements"
simple_explanation: "CA le books check garne"
memory_trick: "Audit = trust certificate"
common_confusions: ["Audit vs tax inspection"]
examples: ["statutory audit threshold"]

metadata.simple_explanation: CA le books check garne
